app.name: fructa
markets.context.sub: Average retail MMF net yield vs the 91-day T-bill and headline inflation, last {n} marks.
markets.context.title: Are MMFs beating inflation?
markets.disclaimer: Gross effective annual yields as published; net strips 15% withholding tax. Every figure is timestamped and traceable to its source. fructa never holds your funds.
markets.insurance.subtitle: Compare motor & travel cover
markets.insurance.title: Insurance
company.coach.body: Turn on notifications and fructa will alert you when this fund’s rate moves. You can manage alerts anytime in Settings.
company.coach.title: Stay on top of this fund
company.moneyNote: Funding and policy binding happen on the provider's platform. fructa never moves money.
company.proj.feeNote: Manager fee {fee}% p.a. is already reflected in the {rate}% yield. It is not charged on top.
company.risk.balancedNote: Blends equities and fixed income, so the value can rise and fall.
company.risk.equityNote: Mostly listed shares. Higher long-run potential with larger swings.
company.risk.fixedIncomeNote: Mostly bonds and fixed deposits. Priced day to day but capital-oriented.
company.risk.mmfNote: Capital-stable and highly liquid. Returns track short-term interest rates.
company.risk.title: RISK PROFILE
company.signalsFoot: Generated from rate history & published documents · not investment advice
company.usdFxNote: earns in USD · KES value shown once live FX lands
compare.buildingHistory:
History builds as rates update.
Compare net yields below.
compare.chartCaption: Gross effective annual yield · last 12 months
compare.empty: Pick funds to compare their yields.
compare.selectHint: Select up to {n} funds to compare.
compare.subtitle: Overlay rate history · pick up to {n}
compare.title: Compare
portfolio.add.inYear: IN A YEAR, NET OF TAX
portfolio.add.noMatch: No fund matches that. Try the manager’s name.
portfolio.add.noneInType: No funds available in this type yet.
portfolio.add.note: fructa tracks this daily from today. Illustration at today’s rate held flat. Not a promise.
portfolio.disclaimer: Values are estimates: each holding grows daily at the fund's net yield from the date you added it. USD positions earn their own USD yield and convert at the CBK indicative rate for the total. Not a promise, and fructa never holds your money.
portfolio.emptyBody: Add what you already hold and Fructa shows your real balance, daily earnings and projections all in one place.
portfolio.manage.removeBody: This removes {name} from your portfolio. Your money is not touched; this is just tracking.
portfolio.manage.was: Was {amt} · a change is logged as a deposit or withdrawal.
portfolio.title: Portfolio
alerts.emptyBody: We'll let you know when a rate you follow moves.
alerts.title: Alerts
stocks.disclaimer: Educational information only, not investment advice. Fructa does not hold your money or place trades.
stocks.empty.body: Listed companies appear here once they are published.
stocks.empty.title: No stocks yet
stocks.noPriceDetail: Fructa shows company facts and declared dividends, not live prices. For today’s price and to trade, use a licensed broker below.
stocks.noPriceList: Fructa shows company facts and declared dividends. For live prices and to trade, use a licensed broker.
stocks.risk.body: Share prices move every trading day and the value of your holding can fall. Higher risk than a money market fund or a T-bill, where the return is known up front.
stocks.risk.label: RISK PROFILE
stocks.spotlight.sub: {n} companies across {s} sectors, dividends and how to buy
stocks.spotlight.subNoSector: {n} listed companies, dividends and how to buy
stocks.spotlight.title: Stocks on the NSE
stocks.step.broker.body: Any CMA-licensed stockbroker or investment bank. Verify them on the CMA licensee list.
stocks.step.broker.title: Choose a licensed broker
stocks.step.cds.body: Your electronic share record at the CDSC, opened through a licensed broker with your ID.
stocks.step.cds.title: Open a CDS account
stocks.step.fund.body: Move money in by bank transfer or M-PESA. You can start with a single share.
stocks.step.fund.title: Fund your account
stocks.step.order.body: A market order buys at the current price. A limit order buys only at a price you set.
stocks.step.order.title: Place a buy order
stocks.step.settle.body: The shares land in your CDS account three business days after the trade.
stocks.step.settle.title: Shares settle to you
stocks.title: Stocks
stocks.whereToBuy.sub: Fructa does not hold your money or place trades. Buy and sell through a CMA-licensed broker.
insure.cr.foot: Above 100 means insurers pay out more than they take in. Motor is the worst book in the market, which is why your renewal keeps climbing and why the spread is so wide.
insure.cr.sub: IRA combined ratio by class, general insurance
insure.cr.title: The market loses money on motor
insure.dir.entry: All {n} on the IRA register, with their standing
insure.dir.sub: {n} on the IRA register, {priced} with published rates
insure.dir.title: Licensed insurers
insure.disc.detail: Figures are indicative and traceable to the insurer's published rates. fructa never sells cover or moves money.
insure.disc.home: fructa compares published rates and cover. It never sells policies or moves money; you bind directly with the insurer or their agent.
insure.disc.motor: Indicative comprehensive premiums from each insurer's rate of value. Final premium, excess and levies are confirmed by the insurer.
insure.disc.travel: Indicative premiums by region and trip length. Cover limits and exclusions are set by the insurer's policy wording.
insure.hero.leadC: quote for the same car, same cover.
insure.hero.leadNone: insurers licensed by the IRA this year, with their standing, their rating, and who the regulator has seized.
insure.homeSub: Compare cover in minutes, not weeks
insure.indicativeNote: Indicative premiums, including levies and stamp duty. Confirm the exact figure with each insurer.
insure.motor.absent: {names} do not publish a third-party-only price. They are absent from this list rather than shown at zero, because we do not know what they charge.
insure.motor.classFoot: Above 100 means insurers pay out more than they take in. Motor is the worst book in the market, which is why your renewal keeps climbing.
insure.motor.classTitle: The market loses money on this class
insure.motor.psvEmptyBody: No insurer has given us a public service vehicle rate. We would rather show you nothing than a number we made up.
insure.motorFoot: Premiums are the base comprehensive rate on your value; add-ons and levies are quoted at binding.
insure.motorSub: One value in, ranked comprehensive quotes out
insure.privacyNote: Nothing leaves your phone until you tap call
insure.proof.body: Fructa lists all {n} insurers the IRA licensed this year, {rated} of them rated by an agency. We show a premium only where the insurer publishes a rate we can price from, and no premium at all where it does not. Nothing binds in the app.
insure.proof.chartFoot: {dear} costs KES {gap} more than {cheap} for the identical cover. That gap is why you compare.
insure.proof.chartSub: A car worth KES {value}, quoted by every insurer that publishes a rate.
insure.proof.title: The spread is the point
insure.review.consent: By submitting you accept the content rules. We store no name, email or phone.
insure.review.disclaimer: Reviews are opinions of Fructa users, not statements of fact by Fructa, and are not a measure of an insurer's financial strength. For that, see the rating above.
insure.review.failed: Could not send that. Try again.
insure.review.iHold: I hold a policy with this insurer
insure.review.noneBody: Be the first to say what actually happened.
insure.review.pending: Your words are with a moderator. Your rating is already counted.
insure.review.placeholder: How long did a claim take? Was the assessor fair? Did the premium change on renewal?
insure.review.rejected: Your words were not published: {reason}. Your rating still counts.
insure.review.reportedAlready: You have already reported this review.
insure.review.rules: Write about your own experience. Do not accuse anyone of a crime, and do not name individual staff. Reviews that do are removed. Fructa does not verify claims made in reviews.
insure.review.submitted: Rating posted. Your words are with a moderator.
insure.review.title: What buyers say
insure.review.writeSub: Anonymous. Your rating appears at once; your words are checked first.
insure.schengenWarn: Schengen visas need a minimum medical cover; every plan shown qualifies.
insure.signalsFoot: Generated from published rates, IRA data and policy wording · not advice
insure.title: Insurance
insure.tpoFlat: Flat annual third-party-only premium, {class} class. Vehicle value does not affect it.
insure.tpoUnpublished: No insurer here publishes a third-party-only price for this class yet.
insure.travelSub: Priced by region and length of trip
insure.trust.closedBody: This insurer is no longer licensed to write new policies.
insure.trust.combinedBad: Above 100: paying out more than it takes in.
insure.trust.combinedGood: Below 100: premiums cover claims and costs.
insure.trust.complaintsNote: Lodged with the IRA in the period.
insure.trust.gradeScale: Where this insurer sits on the national rating scale, from lowest to highest.
insure.trust.licensedNote: On the IRA register for this year.
insure.trust.shareFoot: The IRA names only the largest insurers. The other {n} are reported as one anonymous group, so their individual share is not published. They are not at zero.
insure.trust.shareSub: Gross premium, the {n} insurers the IRA reports by name
insure.trust.statMgmtBody: The IRA placed this insurer under statutory management. It cannot issue new policies. Existing policyholders are advised to seek alternative cover.
insure.trust.title: Trust & standing
insure.trust.tl.share: Holds {pct}% of the general insurance market
insure.why.1: Every premium ties back to the insurer's published rate.
insure.why.2: Ranked by what you actually pay, not who paid to rank.
insure.why.3: Excess, claims speed and benefits shown side by side.
insure.why.4: Nothing binds in-app; you deal with the insurer direct.
insure.why.title: Why compare here
insure.whyPriciest: Why the priciest is worth a look
learn.soonBody: Short, plain-language lessons on MMFs, yields and tax, landing here soon.
learn.title: Money, decoded
lesson.completeBody: Nicely done. Your streak is at {n}.
backup.body: No account needed. Save this recovery code. It is the only way to restore on a new phone or after clearing app data.
backup.failed: Could not back up. Check your connection.
backup.foundBody: A saved portfolio ({n} holdings, {when}) is linked to this device. Restore it?
backup.foundBodyFrom: A saved portfolio from {device} ({n} holdings, {when}) is linked to this device. Restore it?
backup.notFound: No backup found for that code
backup.restoreBody: Enter the recovery code from your other device. This replaces whatever is on this phone.
backup.restoreFailed: Could not restore. Check your connection.
update.body: A new version of fructa is ready. It downloads in the background and installs when you’re done.
update.title: Update available
onboarding.alertsBody: Get a nudge when a money-market rate moves, a T-bill auction prints, or one of your saved comparisons flips its leader.
onboarding.alertsTitle:
We watch the rates
so you don't
onboarding.offBody: You can switch alerts on any time from Settings › Notifications.
onboarding.onBody: You'll hear from us only when something meaningful moves. Fine-tune everything in Settings.
settings.blog.subtitle: Guides & market notes
settings.blog.title: Blog
settings.data.backupSub: Recovery code · restore on any device
settings.data.restoreSub: Enter a code from another phone
settings.disclaimer: fructa · v1.0 · rates from licensed sources, timestamped & traceable
settings.learn.subtitle: MMFs, gross vs net, why rates move
settings.learn.title: Learn
settings.notif.savedSub: When the leader flips or the gap moves > 0.25 pts
settings.sub: No account needed · everything on this device
settings.title: Settings
